meaning: 这首诗描写了一只大白鹅在水面上快乐游动的样子。它的脖子高高翘起，唱着歌，红红的脚掌拨动着清清的绿水，非常可爱。
styleDescription: Classical Chinese ink wash painting mixed with Gongbi style, soft pastel colors, gentle water ripples, playful atmosphere, high quality, detailed feathers, minimalist background.

scenes.title: 碧池初醒
scenes.description: 清晨，阳光透过柳梢洒在平静的池塘上，水面泛起淡淡的金光。几只白鹅从芦苇丛中探出头来，准备开始新的一天。
scenes.prompt: A tranquil pond at dawn, soft morning light filtering through willow branches, gentle ripples on the water surface, distant misty mountains in ink wash style, a few white geese peeking from reeds, soft pastel palette, traditional Chinese painting aesthetic., Wide angle view, focusing on the water surface and the horizon line, creating a sense of peace and openness., Classical Chinese ink wash painting mixed with Gongbi style, soft pastel colors, gentle water ripples, playful atmosphere, high quality, detailed feathers, minimalist background.
scenes.narration: 碧绿的水面映着晨光。白鹅们伸了伸懒腰，准备出来玩耍啦！
scenes.compositionHint: Wide angle view, focusing on the water surface and the horizon line, creating a sense of peace and openness.

scenes.title: 曲项向天歌
scenes.description: 一只大白鹅昂首挺胸，弯曲着长长的脖颈，面向蓝天，张开嘴巴发出响亮的叫声，仿佛在唱歌。
scenes.prompt: Close-up of a cute white goose stretching its neck upwards, beak open as if singing, blue sky background with minimal clouds, detailed white feathers, ink brush texture for the neck curve, vibrant but soft colors., Low angle shot looking up at the goose, emphasizing the curve of the neck and the proud posture., Classical Chinese ink wash painting mixed with Gongbi style, soft pastel colors, gentle water ripples, playful atmosphere, high quality, detailed feathers, minimalist background.
scenes.narration: 鹅，鹅，鹅！你看它弯弯的脖子抬得高高的，好像在对着天空唱好听的歌呢。
scenes.compositionHint: Low angle shot looking up at the goose, emphasizing the curve of the neck and the proud posture.

scenes.title: 白毛浮绿水
scenes.description: 大白鹅洁白的羽毛漂浮在清澈碧绿的湖面上，身体随着水波轻轻晃动，像一片白云落在水中。
scenes.prompt: White goose floating on emerald green water, fluffy white feathers contrasting with the green water, gentle waves around the body, reflection of the goose in the water, serene and harmonious composition, Gongbi detail on feathers., Top-down or eye-level perspective focusing on the contrast between the white body and green water, capturing the floating motion., Classical Chinese ink wash painting mixed with Gongbi style, soft pastel colors, gentle water ripples, playful atmosphere, high quality, detailed feathers, minimalist background.
scenes.narration: 雪白的羽毛漂在碧绿的水上，就像一朵朵白云落在了河里，真漂亮呀。
scenes.compositionHint: Top-down or eye-level perspective focusing on the contrast between the white body and green water, capturing the floating motion.

scenes.title: 红掌拨清波
scenes.description: 镜头下移，特写大白鹅红色的脚掌在清澈的水中轻轻划动，激起一圈圈透明的涟漪，推动着身体向前游去。
scenes.prompt: Close-up of bright red webbed feet paddling in clear water, creating small transparent ripples, water transparency effect, dynamic movement of the feet, soft lighting, traditional Chinese ink style with colored accents., Focus on the lower part of the goose's body and the water interaction, highlighting the movement of the red feet., Classical Chinese ink wash painting mixed with Gongbi style, soft pastel colors, gentle water ripples, playful atmosphere, high quality, detailed feathers, minimalist background.
scenes.narration: 看那红红的脚掌，在水里一下一下地拨动，推着白鹅慢慢往前走，溅起了清清的小波浪。
scenes.compositionHint: Focus on the lower part of the goose's body and the water interaction, highlighting the movement of the red feet.
